rulings.Case Title: ANA MACDONALD VS. DUKE PARTNERS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Duke Partners, Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings To Second Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 12, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT DUKE PARTNERS, LLC'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings To Second Amended Complaint. 1. Motion is granted without leave to amend as to MacDonald who does not have standing to pursue cancellation of Deed and Quiet Title. MacDonald cites no authority for the proposition that a purported beneficial owner has standing to bring causes of action for cancelation of deed and quiet title seeking to be vested with beneficial title. 2. Motion is granted with leave to amend as to Brown to verify the complaint. Motion is otherwise denied. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges that the foreclosure sale is void. =(501/REQ)
